---
name: Feature request
about: Submit a feature requests
labels: ["C-feature-request", "needs-triage"]
---

# Summary
[summary]: #summary

One paragraph explanation of the feature.

# Motivation
[motivation]: #motivation

Any changes should focus on solving a problem, or increasing the functionality to better reflect the domain it is representing.
This section should explain this feature request in detail, including references to, for example, documentation and technical information of how it reflects the ATM domain concepts.

# Guide-level explanation
[guide-level-explanation]: #guide-level-explanation

To bridge the motivation and technical design, most importantly if this is a large conceptual change or API, explain the proposal as if it was already included and you were teaching it to a developer and user.
- Introducing new named concepts, and how both users and dependents use them.
- Explaining the feature largely in terms of examples.
- Explaining how both users should *think* about the feature.

# Potential drawbacks
[drawbacks]: #drawbacks

Why might we *not* want to do this?

# Unresolved questions
[unresolved-questions]: #unresolved-questions

What parts of the design are not clear and you believe remain to be discussed prior to the implementation of this feature request?

# Future possibilities
[future-possibilities]: #future-possibilities

Think about what the natural extension and evolution of your proposal is. This is a good place to dump ideas of what this feature could enable.
